    WHERE [c].[UserID] = @userId
) AS [c1]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c0].[CartItemID], [c0].[CartID], [c0].[ProductID], [c0].[Quantity], [p].[ProductID] AS [ProductID0], [p].[CategoryID], [p].[Price], [p].[ProductImagePath], [p].[ProductName], [p].[Stock]

SELECT [c1].[CartID], [c1].[CreatedDate], [c1].[UserID], [s].[CartItemID], [s].[CartID], [s].[ProductID], [s].[Quantity], [s].[ProductID0], [s].[CategoryID], [s].[Price], [s].[ProductImagePath], [s].[ProductName], [s].[Stock]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [c].[CartID], [c].[CreatedDate], [c].[UserID]
    FROM [carts] AS [c]
    WHERE [c].[UserID] = @userId
) AS [c1]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c0].[CartItemID], [c0].[CartID], [c0].[ProductID], [c0].[Quantity], [p].[ProductID] AS [ProductID0], [p].[CategoryID], [p].[Price], [p].[ProductImagePath], [p].[ProductName], [p].[Stock]
    FROM [cartitems] AS [c0]
    INNER JOIN [products] AS [p] ON [c0].[ProductID] = [p].[ProductID]
) AS [s] ON [c1].[CartID] = [s].[CartID]
ORDER BY [c1].[CartID], [s].[CartItemID]

SELECT [o].[OrderID], [o].[OrderDate], [o].[TotalAmount], [o].[Status], [s].[ProductID], [s].[ProductName], [s].[Quantity], [s].[Price], [s].[OrderDetailID], [s].[ProductID0]
FROM [orders] AS [o]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [o0].[ProductID], [p].[ProductName], [o0].[Quantity], [o0].[Price], [o0].[OrderDetailID], [p].[ProductID] AS [ProductID0], [o0].[OrderID]
    FROM [orderdetails] AS [o0]
    LEFT JOIN [products] AS [p] ON [o0].[ProductID] = [p].[ProductID]
) AS [s] ON [o].[OrderID] = [s].[OrderID]
WHERE [o].[UserID] = @userId
ORDER BY [o].[OrderDate] DESC, [o].[OrderID], [s].[OrderDetailID]

SELECT [p].[ProductID], [p].[ProductName], [p].[Price], [p].[Stock], COALESCE([p].[CategoryID], 0) AS [CategoryID], [p].[ProductImagePath], CASE
    WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [Reviews] AS [r]
        WHERE [p].[ProductID] = [r].[ProductID]) THEN (
        SELECT AVG(CAST([r0].[Rating] AS float))
        FROM [Reviews] AS [r0]
        WHERE [p].[ProductID] = [r0].[ProductID])

    WHERE [p].[ProductID] = [r1].[ProductID]) AS [ReviewCount]

SELECT [p].[ProductID], [p].[ProductName], [p].[Price], [p].[Stock], COALESCE([p].[CategoryID], 0) AS [CategoryID], [p].[ProductImagePath], CASE
    WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [Reviews] AS [r]
        WHERE [p].[ProductID] = [r].[ProductID]) THEN (
        SELECT AVG(CAST([r0].[Rating] AS float))
        FROM [Reviews] AS [r0]
        WHERE [p].[ProductID] = [r0].[ProductID])
    ELSE 0.0E0

    SELECT COUNT(*)

    WHERE [p].[ProductID] = [r1].[ProductID]) AS [ReviewCount]
FROM [products] AS [p]

        SELECT AVG(CAST([r0].[Rating] AS float))
        FROM [Reviews] AS [r0]
        WHERE [p].[ProductID] = [r0].[ProductID])
    ELSE 0.0E0
END AS [AverageRating], (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM [Reviews] AS [r1]
    WHERE [p].[ProductID] = [r1].[ProductID]) AS [ReviewCount]
FROM [products] AS [p]

SELECT [p].[ProductID], [p].[ProductName], [p].[Price], [p].[Stock], COALESCE([p].[CategoryID], 0) AS [CategoryID], [p].[ProductImagePath], CASE
    WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [Reviews] AS [r]
        WHERE [p].[ProductID] = [r].[ProductID]) THEN (
        SELECT AVG(CAST([r0].[Rating] AS float))
        FROM [Reviews] AS [r0]
        WHERE [p].[ProductID] = [r0].[ProductID])
    ELSE 0.0E0
END AS [AverageRating], (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM [Reviews] AS [r1]
    WHERE [p].[ProductID] = [r1].[ProductID]) AS [ReviewCount]
FROM [products] AS [p]

        SELECT 1

SELECT [c1].[CartID], [c1].[CreatedDate], [c1].[UserID], [s].[CartItemID], [s].[CartID], [s].[ProductID], [s].[Quantity], [s].[ProductID0], [s].[CategoryID], [s].[Price], [s].[ProductImagePath], [s].[ProductName], [s].[Stock]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [c].[CartID], [c].[CreatedDate], [c].[UserID]
    FROM [carts] AS [c]
    WHERE [c].[UserID] = @userId
) AS [c1]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c0].[CartItemID], [c0].[CartID], [c0].[ProductID], [c0].[Quantity], [p].[ProductID] AS [ProductID0], [p].[CategoryID], [p].[Price], [p].[ProductImagePath], [p].[ProductName], [p].[Stock]
    FROM [cartitems] AS [c0]
    INNER JOIN [products] AS [p] ON [c0].[ProductID] = [p].[ProductID]
) AS [s] ON [c1].[CartID] = [s].[CartID]
ORDER BY [c1].[CartID], [s].[CartItemID]

    WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [Reviews] AS [r]
        WHERE [p].[ProductID] = [r].[ProductID]) THEN (

    FROM [carts] AS [c]
    WHERE [c].[UserID] = @userId
) AS [c1]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c0].[CartItemID], [c0].[CartID], [c0].[ProductID], [c0].[Quantity], [p].[ProductID] AS [ProductID0], [p].[CategoryID], [p].[Price], [p].[ProductImagePath], [p].[ProductName], [p].[Stock]

    WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [Reviews] AS [r]

SELECT [p].[ProductID], [p].[ProductName], [p].[Price], [p].[Stock], COALESCE([p].[CategoryID], 0) AS [CategoryID], [p].[ProductImagePath], CASE
    WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [Reviews] AS [r]
        WHERE [p].[ProductID] = [r].[ProductID]) THEN (
        SELECT AVG(CAST([r0].[Rating] AS float))
        FROM [Reviews] AS [r0]
        WHERE [p].[ProductID] = [r0].[ProductID])
    ELSE 0.0E0
END AS [AverageRating], (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM [Reviews] AS [r1]
    WHERE [p].[ProductID] = [r1].[ProductID]) AS [ReviewCount]
FROM [products] AS [p]

SELECT [p].[ProductID], [p].[ProductName], [p].[Price], [p].[Stock], COALESCE([p].[CategoryID], 0) AS [CategoryID], [p].[ProductImagePath], CASE
    WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [Reviews] AS [r]
        WHERE [p].[ProductID] = [r].[ProductID]) THEN (
        SELECT AVG(CAST([r0].[Rating] AS float))
        FROM [Reviews] AS [r0]
        WHERE [p].[ProductID] = [r0].[ProductID])
    ELSE 0.0E0
END AS [AverageRating], (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM [Reviews] AS [r1]
    WHERE [p].[ProductID] = [r1].[ProductID]) AS [ReviewCount]
FROM [products] AS [p]

SELECT [p].[ProductID], [p].[ProductName], [p].[Price], [p].[Stock], COALESCE([p].[CategoryID], 0) AS [CategoryID], [p].[ProductImagePath], CASE
    WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [Reviews] AS [r]
        WHERE [p].[ProductID] = [r].[ProductID]) THEN (
        SELECT AVG(CAST([r0].[Rating] AS float))
        FROM [Reviews] AS [r0]
        WHERE [p].[ProductID] = [r0].[ProductID])
    ELSE 0.0E0
END AS [AverageRating], (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM [Reviews] AS [r1]
    WHERE [p].[ProductID] = [r1].[ProductID]) AS [ReviewCount]
FROM [products] AS [p]

    WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [Reviews] AS [r]
        WHERE [p].[ProductID] = [r].[ProductID]) THEN (
        SELECT AVG(CAST([r0].[Rating] AS float))
        FROM [Reviews] AS [r0]

SELECT [p].[ProductID], [p].[ProductName], [p].[Price], [p].[Stock], COALESCE([p].[CategoryID], 0) AS [CategoryID], [p].[ProductImagePath], CASE
    WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [Reviews] AS [r]
        WHERE [p].[ProductID] = [r].[ProductID]) THEN (
        SELECT AVG(CAST([r0].[Rating] AS float))
        FROM [Reviews] AS [r0]
        WHERE [p].[ProductID] = [r0].[ProductID])
    ELSE 0.0E0
END AS [AverageRating], (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM [Reviews] AS [r1]
    WHERE [p].[ProductID] = [r1].[ProductID]) AS [ReviewCount]
FROM [products] AS [p]

SELECT [p].[ProductID], [p].[ProductName], [p].[Price], [p].[Stock], COALESCE([p].[CategoryID], 0) AS [CategoryID], [p].[ProductImagePath], CASE
    WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [Reviews] AS [r]
        WHERE [p].[ProductID] = [r].[ProductID]) THEN (
        SELECT AVG(CAST([r0].[Rating] AS float))
        FROM [Reviews] AS [r0]
        WHERE [p].[ProductID] = [r0].[ProductID])
    ELSE 0.0E0
END AS [AverageRating], (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM [Reviews] AS [r1]
    WHERE [p].[ProductID] = [r1].[ProductID]) AS [ReviewCount]
FROM [products] AS [p]

SELECT [p].[ProductID], [p].[ProductName], [p].[Price], [p].[Stock], COALESCE([p].[CategoryID], 0) AS [CategoryID], [p].[ProductImagePath], CASE
    WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [Reviews] AS [r]
        WHERE [p].[ProductID] = [r].[ProductID]) THEN (
        SELECT AVG(CAST([r0].[Rating] AS float))
        FROM [Reviews] AS [r0]
        WHERE [p].[ProductID] = [r0].[ProductID])
    ELSE 0.0E0
END AS [AverageRating], (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM [Reviews] AS [r1]
    WHERE [p].[ProductID] = [r1].[ProductID]) AS [ReviewCount]
FROM [products] AS [p]

        SELECT 1
        FROM [Reviews] AS [r]

SELECT [p].[ProductID], [p].[ProductName], [p].[Price], [p].[Stock], COALESCE([p].[CategoryID], 0) AS [CategoryID], [p].[ProductImagePath], CASE
    WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [Reviews] AS [r]
        WHERE [p].[ProductID] = [r].[ProductID]) THEN (
        SELECT AVG(CAST([r0].[Rating] AS float))
        FROM [Reviews] AS [r0]
        WHERE [p].[ProductID] = [r0].[ProductID])
    ELSE 0.0E0
END AS [AverageRating], (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM [Reviews] AS [r1]
    WHERE [p].[ProductID] = [r1].[ProductID]) AS [ReviewCount]
FROM [products] AS [p]

SELECT [o].[OrderID], [o].[OrderDate], [o].[TotalAmount], [o].[Status], [s].[ProductID], [s].[ProductName], [s].[Quantity], [s].[Price], [s].[OrderDetailID], [s].[ProductID0]
FROM [orders] AS [o]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [o0].[ProductID], [p].[ProductName], [o0].[Quantity], [o0].[Price], [o0].[OrderDetailID], [p].[ProductID] AS [ProductID0], [o0].[OrderID]
    FROM [orderdetails] AS [o0]
    LEFT JOIN [products] AS [p] ON [o0].[ProductID] = [p].[ProductID]
) AS [s] ON [o].[OrderID] = [s].[OrderID]
WHERE [o].[UserID] = @userId
ORDER BY [o].[OrderDate] DESC, [o].[OrderID], [s].[OrderDetailID]

SELECT [p].[ProductID], [p].[ProductName], [p].[Price], [p].[Stock], COALESCE([p].[CategoryID], 0) AS [CategoryID], [p].[ProductImagePath], CASE
    WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [Reviews] AS [r]
        WHERE [p].[ProductID] = [r].[ProductID]) THEN (
        SELECT AVG(CAST([r0].[Rating] AS float))
        FROM [Reviews] AS [r0]
        WHERE [p].[ProductID] = [r0].[ProductID])
    ELSE 0.0E0
END AS [AverageRating], (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM [Reviews] AS [r1]
    WHERE [p].[ProductID] = [r1].[ProductID]) AS [ReviewCount]
FROM [products] AS [p]
